title: Angelina Lyrics Kalakalappu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Angelina
Singers: Krish, Dr. Burn & Mili Nair

Movie: Kalakalappu @ Masala Cafe
Music: Vijay Ebenezer
Lyricist: Pa.Vijay

Angelina oh Angelina oh ..
Angelina Angelina ...

Enuyir kaadhali nee
vey cute pannu
Neeyum naanum veru alla
irandum onnu

Solla solla adangaadhu
Alla alla kuraiyaadhu
sollapona perazhagi
kutti ponnu,chutti ponnu
very cute ponnu

I love you sollu
kattipudi muthamkodu
aedhaachum pannu

Irudhivarai ennodu kaikorthu nillu
Darling lets step together

SOlla solla vandhu vandhu
mella vaikum kaadhal
Ullukulle sollai vaithu
solla vaikum kaadhal
Sollum podhu varthaindri
kolla vaikum kaadhal
kadhale

Enna enna mayam enna
ennidathil seithaai
chinna chinna punnagayil
seithi enna sonnai
vanna vanna paarvayaale
nenjai kondu ponaai
kadhali

Oh kadhaliye ennai yedho sikirai
uyir engilum poopoovai neikirai
kadhal kadhal sugam tharum vali
valiyil arindhen ne varum vazhi

Angelina en swasame
unnakagave en nenjam
Angelina en kadhale
unnai konjava konjam (2)

Kairegai pola nee
ennodu vaazhkirai
Angelina en kadhale oh ..

Gimme gimme gimme gimme
love story
pudavai kattum penne
romba beauty
Kadhali kondaadalaam
idhu nalla thedhi
Paadhu sollivitten
nee soll meedhi

Nilavin kel amarvome
nizhal padaadha idam thoduvome

Neeyum naanum saripaathi
nitham mutham parimaai
ini vidiyum varai paniyil nanaivome
anbae ..

Thottu thottu ennai thottu
pogudhe un vasam
vittu vittu moochu vittu
aengudhe en swasam
Madhiyaana veyililum
malligai poovesam neeyadi.

Thuppataavil ennai ennai
katti vaithu kondaai
Thoongu podhu endhan vazhi
vandhu vandhu sendraai
Thoosi pattaal kannimaikul
oothivittu thandhai uyiraye

En saalaigal irupakkam poomaram
pooengilum un vaasam veesidum
penne undhan nizhal vilumidam
sorgam mannai vandhu thodumidam

Angelina en swasame
unnakagave en nenjam
Angelina en kadhale
unnai konjava konjam

Nee vandhu ponapin
enarayil veesudhe
Angelina un vaasame ...

Angelina en swasame
unnakagave en nenjam
Angelina en kadhale
unnai konjava konjam ...

Enuyir kaadhali nee
vey cute pannu
Neeyum naanum veru alla

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Angelina'?

The song 'Angelina' expresses playful affection and admiration, celebrating the charm of the beloved.

How does 'Angelina' fit into the plot of the movie Kalakalappu?

In Kalakalappu, 'Angelina' serves as a lively number that highlights the romantic escapades of the characters, adding to the film's comedic and entertaining narrative.

Who are the singers of 'Angelina'?

'Angelina' features the talented voices of Dr Burn, Krish, and Mili, each bringing their unique style to the track.

Who composed the music for 'Angelina'?

The music for 'Angelina' was composed by Vijay Ebenezer, known for his catchy and engaging tunes.

When was 'Angelina' released?

'Angelina' was released on April 23, 2012, as part of the film Kalakalappu.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Angelina' is a lively duet that captures the playful essence of love, perfectly suited for festive celebrations. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and romance, making it a favorite for weddings and parties. Set against the backdrop of the film Kalakalappu, it enhances the lighthearted narrative and showcases the chemistry between the characters. With its infectious energy, 'Angelina' is sure to leave listeners smiling and dancing along.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Angelina from the movie Kalakalappu is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between Dr Burn, Krish, and Mili. The catchy beats and playful lyrics create an infectious vibe that makes it perfect for any festive occasion. Dive into this delightful track that captures the essence of youthful romance and exuberance!
stanzaMeanings: Angelina
Kalakalappu @ Masala Cafe Music: Vijay Ebenezer Lyricist: Pa.Vijay
Angelina oh Angelina oh .. Angelina Angelina ...
You are my life’s love, you are very cute. You and I are not different, we are one.
Don’t stop saying it. Don’t say there are shortcomings. The beautiful girl who speaks is very cute.
Say I love you, give a kiss, do whatever you want.
Until now, hold my hand. Darling, let's step together.
Come and say it softly, love. Keep love in your heart and say it. When love speaks, it should be heard.
What magic is this? What have you done to me? With small smiles, you have captured my heart.
Oh my love, you are like a flower. Love gives happiness, I know the way it comes.
Angelina, my breath is for you. My heart, Angelina, is yours completely.
Like a shadow, you live with me. Angelina, my love, oh ..
Gimme gimme gimme gimme love story. The girl who wears a dress is very beautiful. Love is a good search, I have told you to sing, you tell me.
Let’s enjoy the moonlight and not leave the shade.
You and I are perfect together, let’s think of each other until dawn, my love ..
Touching me, you are taking me away. Leaving your place, my breath is lost. Even in the bright sun, you are like a jasmine flower.
In the dance, you have caught me. When I sleep, my path comes to me. If you are disturbed, you will give life to my eyes.
In my dreams, even if flowers bloom, your fragrance will blow, my girl, your shadow will touch the earth.
Angelina, my breath is for you. My heart, Angelina, is yours completely.
You come and blow in my direction, Angelina, your fragrance ...
Angelina, my breath is for you. My heart, Angelina, is yours completely ...
You are my life’s love, you are very cute. You and I are not different, we are one.
Don’t stop saying it. Don’t say there are shortcomings. The beautiful girl who speaks is very cute.
Darling, let's step together.
